description: Negative / minimal case. Expects exactly one story area (work-order confirmation email deliverability) with NO hallucinated stories about the puppy, coffee debts, or Friday rants.

required_topics.rationale: The one real product issue in the note — work-order confirmation emails going to Gmail spam — must be picked up.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Personal small-talk. Anti-hallucination check — the system must not invent product stories from social content.
Social chatter — not a product backlog item.
